basic_info.short_form: Sasmira's Institute of Management Studies and Research Mumbai

address.map_location: Sasmira's Institute of Management Studies and Research , Mumbai

pos_sentences: The faculty is well trained and well educated, they always motivated their students towards education and other practical knowledge also, they giving good mentorship and very interactive

The cleanness in the college is very good, the guard and other staff strike with their rules and regulation, the college placement is very good they always try to place all their students with good company with good packages,
They provide installment options and various reservation benefits and also they have government scholarship like ebc scholarship.
The college has good infrastructure like sufficient amenities like ac classrooms, projectors, smart boards etc.
The addmission process is very easy and college also very helpful during the admission process.
Masters in management studies offers updated curriculum with respect to what industry's expectations also beyond that, our respected faculty tries to impart the practical knowledge.
I got internship opportunity from college placement cell that helped me gain experience in my field.
neg_sentences: Poor canteen facilities as in they take long time to serve the food
The hygiene in the restroom is not so good.
Parking problem whenever there is an event in the college.
